# Testing in Multiple Regression Models (2) {testing-multiple-regression-2}

```{r testing-multiple-regression-2-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/testing-multiple-regression-2-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/testing-multiple-regression-2/"
)
```

```{r child-testing-multiple-regression-2, child="../lecture-content/11-testing-multiple-regression-2.Rmd"}
```
